Notes
Global Note Text Sizes
These values are global and scale all notes together relative to the export safe frame height. Value 36 matches about 36px on a 1080-high safe frame.
Linked notes update from this library. Unlinked notes keep their own custom text.

Export
Exports only the composed presentation output: 3D viewport + scene notes. UI chrome such as prompts, selection controls, and editor panels stays out of the rendered file.
Aspect ratio: 16:9
Local narrated export uses a shared Piper helper on your machine. Keep the shared helper running, and all HTML versions can use it.
MP4 / H.264 uses the deterministic export helper. Put it next to the shared Piper helper folder, start it locally, and keep it running while exporting.
Save target
No folder selected. Video exports fall back to save dialog or browser download. PNG sequence will download each frame unless a folder is selected.
Checks video encoder support at runtime and always allows PNG sequence export.
